full_text:
Cen Hun 岑昏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cen Hun (岑昏). A favorite of Sun Hao, he was killed and eaten by palace officials. Cen Hun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Cen Hun lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
